domain_description: Soundwave is a music streaming platform database. It tracks artists, albums, tracks, users, playlists, subscriptions, play events, and payments.

glossary.is_prim: is primary artist on a track (1=yes, 0=no)
glossary.subscription_plans.has_hifi: plan includes high-fidelity / lossless / hi-fi audio (1=yes, 0=no) — 'high-fidelity audio' questions filter this column, it is NOT a genre or track attribute
glossary.artists.country: ISO-3166 alpha-2 country code, e.g. 'CO' for Colombia, 'US' for United States — never the full country name
glossary.users.country: ISO-3166 alpha-2 country code, e.g. 'CO' for Colombia, 'US' for United States — never the full country name
glossary.play_events.country_code: ISO-3166 alpha-2 code of where the event fired — distinct from users.country (VPN/travel)
glossary.daily_artist_metrics.country_code: ISO-3166 alpha-2 country code, part of the composite primary key

source_of_truth.monthly_listeners_cached: daily_artist_metrics (pre-aggregated — use for reports, not real-time)
source_of_truth.total_plays: tracks.total_plays is a cached counter; use COUNT(play_events) for accuracy

join_preferences._comment: sorted "tableA|tableB" -> canonical bridge table. Settles an equally-short-route tie the FK graph cannot call, and silences the ambiguity caveat for that pair. Only add an entry when the domain really has one right answer.
